description_long: This is a rustic, triangular piece of bread with a golden-brown crust and a dusting of white flour on its upper surface. The bread has an irregular, chunky shape with visible cracks and crevices, giving it a handmade, artisanal appearance. Embedded within the crust are several dark chocolate chips or chunks, which are partially melted and protrude from the surface. The texture of the crust appears rough and uneven, with some areas more browned than others, suggesting a well-baked exterior. The interior, visible at some edges, looks dense and slightly moist, typical of a scone or a similar baked good. There are no visible labels, packaging, or branding on the bread.
description: A rustic, triangular bread piece with a golden-brown, flour-dusted crust and embedded chocolate chunks. The surface is rough and artisanal, with visible cracks and a dense interior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the broad, flat side of the bread with a prominent dusting of flour and several chocolate chunks embedded in the crust.
description_view_1: This angled view highlights the pointed end of the bread and reveals more of the rough, uneven crust and chocolate pieces.
description_view_2: A side view displaying the full length of the bread, emphasizing the flour-dusted top and the irregular, chunky shape.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the tapered end, with fewer chocolate chunks visible and a clear view of the bread's dense, textured surface.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is irregular and rustic, with a heavy dusting of white flour and scattered chocolate chunks. There are no visible scoring marks, but the surface is cracked and uneven, giving it a handmade appearance.
